company.name: AstraZeneca PLC
company.subtitle: $58.7B 2025 (+9%) | Most diversified mega-cap pharma | $80B 2030 ambition | 20 launches 2025-30
company.cashRunway: Self-funding ($16B+ op cash flow); active M&A within $40-50B leverage capacity

market.notes: 3rd-gen EGFR TKI; near-monopoly in EGFR-mutant NSCLC. FLAURA 1L + ADAURA adjuvant + LAURA Stage III unresectable post-CRT. ~$7.25B 2025 (+12%). US composition LOE ~2032. Future: FLAURA2 (osi+chemo combo), savolitinib add-on for cMET+, datopotamab combos.

us.reachPct.note: Tagrisso ~70% of US EGFR+ NSCLC pool; near-monopoly post FLAURA-2 + LAURA expansions.

market.notes: PD-L1 mAb. PACIFIC Stage III post-CRT consolidation (standard-of-care 1L unresectable), AEGEAN perioperative resectable NSCLC, ADRIATIC LS-SCLC. ~$3.5B 2025 NSCLC portion.

us.reachPct.note: Imfinzi ~6% of broad IO-treatable NSCLC pool (PACIFIC dominant Stage III).

market.notes: CASPIAN ES-SCLC 1L + ADRIATIC LS-SCLC consolidation. ~$1.1B 2025 portion.

us.reachPct.note: Imfinzi ~35% of US SCLC IO pool.

market.notes: TOPAZ-1 1L advanced biliary + Imjudo HIMALAYA HCC. ~$350M 2025.

us.reachPct.note: Imfinzi 1L biliary ~35% reach (TOPAZ-1 standard).

market.notes: HIMALAYA STRIDE Imjudo (CTLA-4) + Imfinzi 1L unresectable HCC. ~$700M 2025.

us.reachPct.note: Imjudo+Imfinzi ~12% of US 1L HCC pool.

market.notes: NIAGARA perioperative MIBC. ~$450M 2025 portion.

us.reachPct.note: Imfinzi ~8% of US bladder pool.

market.notes: Selective BTK inhibitor; ELEVATE-TN 1L CLL + 2L+. ~$3B CLL portion. Class leader 1L CLL post Imbruvica decline.

us.reachPct.note: Calquence ~28% of US CLL pool; class leader 1L.

market.notes: ECHO 1L MCL acalabrutinib + chemo. ~$500M MCL portion.

us.reachPct.note: Calquence ~25% MCL pool.

assets.name: Lynparza (olaparib, PARP) — w/ MRK profit-share (AZ books global)

market.notes: PARP inhibitor; ovarian BRCA+/HRD+ 1L maintenance + 2L+ recurrence. ~$1.5B AZ-booked share of $3B+ Lynparza global. Largest indication.

us.reachPct.note: AZ Lynparza ~18% of US ovarian pool (BRCA+/HRD+ ~30% of ovarian); AZ books global commercial, MRK 50% profit-share.

market.notes: OlympiA adjuvant gBRCA+ HER2- + OlympiAD metastatic. ~$700M AZ portion.

us.reachPct.note: AZ Lynparza ~8% of breast (gBRCA+ subset).

market.notes: PROpel + PROfound HRR-mutated mCRPC + Lynparza+abiraterone. ~$850M AZ portion.

us.reachPct.note: AZ Lynparza ~7% mCRPC HRR-mutated.

market.notes: POLO gBRCA+ pancreatic maintenance. ~$230M AZ portion.

us.reachPct.note: AZ Lynparza ~2% pancreatic (gBRCA+).

market.notes: DESTINY-Breast03/04/06/09. ~$1.9B AZ portion (50/50 with Daiichi). Class-defining HER2 ADC; HER2-low and ultralow expanding TAM.

us.reachPct.note: Enhertu ~12% US HER2-pos+low/ultralow breast pool (AZ 50% share).

market.notes: DESTINY-Gastric01/04 HER2+ advanced gastric. ~$500M AZ portion.

us.reachPct.note: Enhertu ~8% HER2+ gastric pool.

market.notes: DESTINY-Lung01/02 HER2-mutated NSCLC. ~$380M AZ portion.

us.reachPct.note: Enhertu ~25% HER2-mutated NSCLC subset.

market.notes: AKT inhibitor; CAPItello-291 PIK3CA/AKT1/PTEN-altered HR+/HER2- breast post-CDK4/6. ~$728M 2025. Peak forecast $3-5B with label expansion.

us.reachPct.note: Truqap ~5% HR+/HER2- breast (biomarker-altered subset post-CDK4/6).

assets.name: Datroway (datopotamab deruxtecan, TROP2 ADC) — w/ Daiichi 50/50

market.notes: TROP2 ADC. Approved HR+/HER2- breast (Jan 2025), EGFR+ NSCLC (Jun 2025). Datroway Priority Review 1L mTNBC Q1 2026 (TROPION-Breast02 OS+PFS positive). $78M Q4 2025; peak forecast $3-4B.

us.reachPct.note: Datroway ~4% peak reach across breast+NSCLC TROP2-eligible (early launch ramping; AZ 50% share).
Farxiga ~8% reach across T2D + HF + CKD pools combined; SGLT2 class duopoly with Jardiance.

market.notes: T2D primary indication; SGLT2 class duopoly w/ Jardiance.

us.reachPct.note: Farxiga ~8% reach across T2D + HF + CKD pools combined; SGLT2 class duopoly with Jardiance.

market.notes: DAPA-HF positive 2019; Class 1A guideline rec for HFrEF.

us.reachPct.note: Farxiga ~8% reach across T2D + HF + CKD pools combined; SGLT2 class duopoly with Jardiance.

market.notes: DELIVER positive 2022; broadened HF label across full LVEF spectrum.

us.reachPct.note: Farxiga ~8% reach across T2D + HF + CKD pools combined; SGLT2 class duopoly with Jardiance.

market.notes: DAPA-CKD 2020; SGLT2i now standard CKD-DM + non-DM CKD.
P2Y12 inhibitor anti-platelet for ACS + post-PCI. US LOE 2024-25 ongoing; sharp decline. Generic ticagrelor launched 2024.

us.reachPct.note: Brilinta ~1.5% post-LOE; declining branded.

market.notes: ICS/LABA fixed-dose combo. Asthma + COPD maintenance. ~$2.89B 2025. Biosimilar pressure; Symbicort generics Wixela (Mylan) etc.

us.reachPct.note: Symbicort ~8% of asthma+COPD combined branded ICS/LABA pool; biosimilar erosion.

market.notes: Budesonide+glycopyrrolate+formoterol triple inhaler for COPD. ~$1.2B 2025 (+12%).

us.reachPct.note: Breztri ~4% US COPD branded triple.

market.notes: Anti-IL-5 mAb. Severe eosinophilic asthma + Churg-Strauss + EGPA. ~$1.98B 2025. Failed COPD Ph3 2024. Class peer: Nucala (GSK mepolizumab), Cinqair (Teva reslizumab), Dupixent (Sanofi/REGN).

us.reachPct.note: Fasenra ~12% severe asthma biologic-eligible pool.

assets.name: Tezspire (tezepelumab, TSLP) — w/ Amgen 50/50
assets.stage: Commercial ($1.13B AZ 2025; COPD readout pending H1 2026)

market.notes: Anti-TSLP mAb; first-in-class. Severe asthma broad eosinophil profile. ~$1.13B AZ portion ($1.94B combined w/ Amgen). COPD readout pending H1 2026.

us.reachPct.note: Tezspire ~7% asthma biologic pool (AZ 50% share).

market.notes: Anti-TSLP for EGPA Ph3 ongoing. Class leader Nucala (GSK anti-IL-5) approved 2017.

us.reachPct.note: Tezspire EGPA pipeline AZN-share

market.notes: Anti-IFN-α type 1 receptor mAb. First-in-class for SLE. ~$686M 2025. Subcutaneous formulation launching 2026. Class peer: Benlysta (GSK belimumab).

us.reachPct.note: Saphnelo ~4% of US SLE biologic-eligible pool.

market.notes: Anti-IFN-α Type 1 receptor mAb for lupus nephritis Ph3 (TULIP-LN ongoing). Class peer: Benlysta (GSK BLISS-LN approved 2020), Lupkynis (Aurinia voclosporin).

us.reachPct.note: Saphnelo LN Ph3

market.notes: C5 complement inhibitors. Soliris declining (post-LOE biosimilar pressure); Ultomiris growing (long-acting Q8W IV). PNH ~$2.2B combined. Class peers: Empaveli (Apellis pegcetacoplan), Fabhalta (Novartis iptacopan), Voydeya (danicopan add-on).

us.reachPct.note: AZ Soliris+Ultomiris ~35% of US PNH (~7K Rx pop).

market.notes: C5-blockade for aHUS thrombotic microangiopathy. ~$1.1B combined.

us.reachPct.note: AZ ~50% of US aHUS chronic Rx pool.

market.notes: C5-blockade for AChR+ gMG. ~$1.9B combined growing rapidly. Class peer: Vyvgart (Argenx efgartigimod FcRn).

us.reachPct.note: AZ Soliris+Ultomiris ~18% of US AChR+ gMG; competing with Vyvgart.

market.notes: Recombinant TNSALP enzyme replacement. Pediatric + adult HPP. ~$1.5B 2025 (+15%).

us.reachPct.note: Strensiq ~40% of US HPP diagnosed (~3K).

assets.name: Wainua (eplontersen, ATTR-PN) — w/ Ionis
assets.stage: Commercial 2024 launch; ATTR-CM Ph3 readout pending

market.notes: TTR ASO from Ionis partnership. Approved 2024 ATTR-PN. ATTR-CM Ph3 readout pending — meaningful upside vs Pfizer Vyndaqel (~$4.4B). ~$200M 2025 ramp.

us.reachPct.note: Wainua ~8% ATTR-PN pool 2030 peak; share with Onpattro/Amvuttra (Alnylam).

assets.name: Camizestrant (next-gen oral SERD) — breast Ph3
assets.stage: FDA review; SERENA-6 positive (HR+ BC w/ ESR1 mut)

market.notes: Next-gen oral selective estrogen receptor degrader. SERENA-6 56% PFS reduction in HR+/HER2- BC w/ emergent ESR1 mutation. FDA review; launch H2 2026. Peak forecast $2-4B.

us.reachPct.note: Camizestrant ~5% peak HR+/HER2- BC ESR1-mutant subset post-CDK4/6.

market.notes: Selective aldosterone synthase inhibitor. BAX-CSO Ph3 in resistant HTN. PDUFA Q2 2026. Specialist-then-PCP rollout. Peak forecast $2-4B globally if class establishes.

us.reachPct.note: Baxdrostat ~3% peak resistant HTN by 2030.

market.notes: First oral PCSK9 inhibitor. Ph2b showed >50% LDL-C reduction on top of statins. AZURE-LDL + AZURE-HeFH Ph3 readouts 2027. Peak forecast $5-10B as oral alternative to injectable PCSK9 mAbs (Repatha/Praluent).

us.reachPct.note: AZD0780 ~2.5% peak ASCVD oral PCSK9 capture by 2032; oral expansion vs injectable.

assets.name: AZD5004 (oral GLP-1 from Eccogene) — obesity Ph2

market.notes: Oral GLP-1 receptor agonist licensed from Eccogene 2023 ($185M upfront). Phase 2 obesity ongoing. Differentiation: tolerability + tablet format. Race vs LLY orforglipron, NOVO oral Wegovy, Pfizer pipeline.

us.reachPct.note: AZD5004 ~1.5% peak US obesity if Ph3 launches 2029+.

market.notes: Bispecific PD-1 x CTLA-4. Combines two AZ checkpoints in single molecule. eVOLVE-Lung02 1L NSCLC vs Imfinzi+chemo, eVOLVE-Cervical Ph3. Readouts 2027.

us.reachPct.note: Volrustomig ~4% peak NSCLC IO if Ph3 hits 2027+.

mega_bear.narrative: Tagrisso 2032 LOE preview + Datroway/camizestrant disappoint + China slowdown + Imfinzi share war
events: X Tagrisso 2030+ LOE prep accelerates; biosimilar erosion early
X Datroway commercial launch underwhelms vs Enhertu
X Camizestrant Ph3 narrow ESR1-only label limits opportunity
X Baxdrostat Ph3 cardio outcomes don't differentiate
X China oncology slowdown post-VBP rounds
X Lynparza generic 2028 + Soliris/Ultomiris biosimilar pressure
-> Stock to $130-140 (LOE wave preview)

bear.narrative: Solid execution + cliff approaching + pipeline slow
events: ~ Tagrisso flat through 2030 then LOE
~ Datroway ramp $1-2B by 2028
~ Camizestrant launches but ESR1-mut subset limits to ~$1B
~ Baxdrostat approved + slow PCP penetration
~ Volrustomig Ph3 borderline

base.narrative: $80B 2030 ambition tracking + ADC franchise + new launches deliver
events: V Datroway franchise $4-6B 2030 across breast+NSCLC
V Camizestrant launches H2 2026; $2-3B peak
V Baxdrostat approved + class-establishing in resistant HTN
V Volrustomig + Imjudo combos extend Imfinzi franchise post-Tagrisso LOE
V Ultomiris drives Alexion growth past Soliris LOE
V Wainua ATTR-CM Ph3 positive — challenges Vyndaqel
V China + EM growth resumes

bull.narrative: $80B+ 2030 + ADC platform leadership + breakthrough oral PCSK9 + Wainua ATTR-CM beats Vyndaqel
events: V Datroway combos drive $7B+ 2030 franchise
V Camizestrant + saruparib next-gen breast/PARP $5B+
V AZD0780 oral PCSK9 first-in-class wins; $5-10B peak
V Wainua ATTR-CM Ph3 positive — captures 30%+ Vyndaqel share
V Ultomiris $7B+ across PNH/aHUS/MG/IGAN expansion
V China growth accelerates

psychedelic_bull.narrative: $100B+ 2030 + ADC + radioconjugate + cell therapy platform + transformative M&A
events: V $100B+ 2030 -- exceeds ambition
V Datroway+Enhertu+future ADCs $15B+ combined oncology ADC franchise
V Cell therapy (BCMA + CD19 autoimmune) launches deliver $3B+
V Radioconjugates (Fusion FPI-2265 PSMA-Ac225) wins prostate
V Multiple expansion to peak premium pharma multiples

lastData.title: FY2025 $58.7B (+9%); 2030 ambition $80B reaffirmed; 16 blockbusters
points: Oncology $25.6B (+14%) -- Tagrisso $7.25B + Imfinzi $6.06B + Calquence $3.52B + Lynparza $3.28B + Enhertu $2.78B + Truqap $0.73B + Datroway $0.08B (new launch)
CV/Renal/Metabolic: Farxiga $8.41B (+13%, top product) + Brilinta $0.82B declining
Rare disease (Alexion) $9.1B (+4%) -- Ultomiris growing, Soliris declining
Camizestrant SERENA-6 positive (56% PFS reduction, ESR1-mut) -- FDA review

nextCatalyst.title: Baxdrostat PDUFA + camizestrant decision + tezspire COPD + datroway 1L mTNBC
thresholds: H1 2026: Camizestrant FDA decision (1L HR+/HER2- breast)
H2 2026: AVANZAR + TROPION-Lung07/08 NSCLC Ph3 readouts

risks: Tagrisso US LOE ~2032 ($7.25B at risk) -- biggest single risk; saruparib + datroway combos potential offset
Lynparza US LOE 2028-29 ($3.28B AZ) -- saruparib internal succession
Soliris LOE wave biosimilar pressure; Ultomiris conversion working
Datroway commercial success uncertain vs Enhertu cannibalization + competitive ADCs (Pfizer sigvotatug, Merck I-DXd)
China oncology slowdown post-VBP; AZ #1 MNC China oncology
Wainua ATTR-CM Ph3 readout pending -- competitive vs Pfizer Vyndaqel (~$4.4B); could catalyze upside if positive
AZD0780 oral PCSK9 vs LLY oral PCSK9 (lerodalcibep) competitive
AZD5004 obesity Ph2 - behind LLY/NOVO duopoly + small acquisition
Net debt manageable but limits transformative M&A capacity ($40-50B leverage)
Camizestrant ESR1-mut subset narrow vs broader HR+ market

catalysts.title: Baxdrostat PDUFA — resistant hypertension
catalysts._rationale: BAX-CSO Ph3 positive; FDA action Q2 2026 per AZ pipeline.

catalysts.title: Camizestrant FDA decision — HR+/HER2- breast (ESR1-mut)
catalysts._rationale: SERENA-6 56% PFS reduction; FDA review H1 2026.

catalysts.title: Datroway 1L mTNBC sBLA decision (Priority Review Q1 2026)
catalysts._rationale: TROPION-Breast02 OS+PFS positive; Priority Review granted Q1 2026.

catalysts.title: AVANZAR Ph3 (Datroway+Imfinzi+chemo, 1L NSQ NSCLC)
catalysts._rationale: AVANZAR readout H2 2026 per AZ Feb 2026 pipeline.
